description_long: This is a standard long-handled shovel featuring a straight, cylindrical wooden handle and a black, round-point metal blade. The handle is smooth and tapers slightly toward the blade, with no visible grip or ergonomic features at the top. The blade is broad and curves gently, forming a rounded point at the tip, ideal for digging into soil or loose materials. The transition between the handle and blade is reinforced with a metal collar, providing structural stability. The surface of the blade has a matte finish, and the handle displays a natural wood grain. There are no visible brand markings, mounting holes, or signs of wear on any part of the shovel.
description: A long-handled shovel with a straight wooden shaft and a black, round-point metal blade. The design is simple, sturdy, and shows no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight wooden handle and the broad, rounded black blade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the handle and blade shape clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim edge of the blade and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with a smooth finish and no additional grip features.
attribute_blade_type: Round-point metal blade with a gentle curve and a pointed tip, matte black finish.
